apps.name: Deepsearch AI Search Assistant
apps.description: Find Anyone Online with Ease – The Ultimate AI Powered People Search & Social Media Lookup App!  Ever wondered where to find social profiles of someone you just met? Looking to reconnect with an old friend or check out a new acquaintance's social media presence? Our powerful DeepSearch AI Search Assistant app helps you discover publicly available information about individuals effortlessly – all in one place!  With just a name, our AI Search Assistant scans multiple platforms, letting you find people online quickly and conveniently. No more endless searching across multiple websites—our social media profile discovery tool consolidates everything in a single, easy-to-use interface.   • Why Choose Our People Search & Social Media Lookup App? - Find Social Profiles Easily – Search by name, or username to locate social media accounts across various platforms. - Comprehensive Background Search – Access publicly available records, images, videos, and other relevant information about people. - Find Friends Online – Reconnect with lost contacts, old classmates, or former colleagues in just a few taps. - Social Media Discovery – Get insights into someone’s online presence, including publicly available professional and personal information. - Stay Informed – Instantly see what’s trending and discover who’s being searched the most. - Quick & Simple Searches – Our intuitive interface makes finding people online fast, efficient, and hassle-free.   • Powerful Features at Your Fingertips! - Advanced Social Media Finder: Locate someone’s social accounts, including any social media accounts. - Cross-Platform Search – Save time by searching multiple sources at once instead of manually browsing different websites. - Publicly Available Background Info – See professional details, online mentions, and other insights about individuals. - Find PPL Online in Just Seconds – Enter a name or username, and we’ll handle the rest. - Search History & Popular Searches – Keep track of your previous searches and explore the most searched individuals. - Privacy & Transparency – We only provide publicly accessible information, ensuring ethical and responsible use.   •Who Can Benefit from This App? - Networking Enthusiasts: Whether you're at a business event or meeting someone new, find their online profiles instantly. - Recruiters & Employers: Look up professional backgrounds to make informed hiring decisions. - Journalists & Researchers: Gather publicly available data for articles, reports, and investigations. - Curious Individuals: Learn more about friends, colleagues, or even public figures without the hassle of searching manually. - Online Daters: Verify someone’s online and publicly available presence before taking the next step.   No more guesswork or endless web searches! Whether you're trying to find social profiles, reconnect with a friend, or conduct a background search, our app delivers fast and accurate results using publicly available data.   UNLIMITED ACCESS TO ALL FEATURES - You can subscribe for unlimited access to all app’s features. - Subscriptions are billed automatically at the rate depending on the selected subscription plan.  By using the app, you confirm that you acknowledge and accept our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service: Privacy Policy: https://deepsearchai.app/privacy Terms of Use:  https://deepsearchai.app/terms

apps.name: OneSearch: DeepSearch Finder
apps.description: Think Smarter. Search Deeper. Discover More.  OneSearch: DeepSearch Finder is an advanced AI-powered search app built to help you explore information, analyze profiles, and conduct deep research with clarity and confidence.  Unlike traditional search engines that return endless links, OneSearch: DeepSearch Finder transforms AI-powered search into structured insights — helping you move from raw information to real understanding.  AI Deep Search – Smarter AI Search Engine: Deep Search is the core of OneSearch: Deep Search & AI Chat. It goes far beyond keyword-based results and basic summaries.  Instead of manually scanning multiple sources, the app intelligently analyzes and organizes information for you by: – Performing AI-powered web search with contextual understanding – Analyzing information across multiple sources – Synthesizing key insights into clear, structured summaries – Comparing perspectives and explaining complex relationships – Exploring public profiles and digital presence – Helping you review and understand available personal information  From academic research and professional background checks to everyday curiosity, this AI Search engine turns information into meaningful insight.  AI Assistant Chat – Your Intelligent Follow-Up Tool: While Deep Search is the foundation, OneSearch: Deep Search & AI Chat also includes a powerful AI Assistant Chat to help you interact with results and refine your thinking.  With AI Assistant Chat, you can: – Ask follow-up or complex questions based on search results – Receive structured explanations and deeper breakdowns – Continue conversations naturally with context awareness – Brainstorm ideas and explore topics step by step  OneSearch also includes additional smart tools: – AI Math Solving: Solve math problems step by step with clear explanations, from basic calculations to advanced topics. – Image-Based Search: Upload an image to extract text, identify content, or search visually with AI analysis. – Voice Chat AI: Interact naturally using voice for hands-free searching and questioning.  These tools complement Deep Search and support research, productivity, and everyday problem-solving.  Designed for Focus, Speed, and Trust: – Clean, intuitive interface optimized for Apple devices – Fast AI-powered search and contextual responses – Built for research, profile exploration, learning, and informed decision-making  OneSearch: DeepSearch Finder is an independent application that uses officially licensed AI technologies. We respect your privacy and do not collect personal data.  SUBSCRIPTION INFORMATION: • Upgrade to Premium to unlock the full power of OneSearch: • Unlimited AI chats and Deep Searches • Faster response times • Ad-free experience  Subscription options include weekly and yearly plans. Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account upon confirmation. Subscriptions renew automatically unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.  Contact & Support: If you have any questions or need support, please contact us at: info@begamob.com  Privacy Policy: https://ai-smart.southpolemob.com/privacy-policy Terms of Use: https://ai-smart.southpolemob.com/terms-of-service

apps.name: DoubleCheck: AI People Search
apps.description: DoubleCheck — AI People Search  Before you trust them, DoubleCheck them.  Enter a name. DoubleCheck's AI scans the public web and gives you a complete profile in seconds — photos, social accounts, online mentions, and key details, all in one place.  Use DoubleCheck before you...  · Go on a first date · Meet someone you matched with online · Trust a new acquaintance · Let someone into your home · Reconnect with an old friend · See what others find when they search your name  How it works  1. Enter a name. Add a city or photo for better accuracy. 2. AI scans live public sources in seconds. 3. Get a clean profile with photos, social accounts, and details. 4. Ask follow-up questions to explore further.  Why DoubleCheck  · AI that does the work for you. Don't just search, get an analyzed summary. · Live web data. Always fresh. We don't rely on stale databases. · One place, one search. No more switching between Google, Instagram, LinkedIn, and Facebook. · Verifiable sources. Every detail links back to its public origin. · Discreet. Your search stays private. The person you searched is never notified.  For personal use  DoubleCheck aggregates publicly available information from across the web. We do not access private accounts or hidden data.  DoubleCheck is for personal curiosity, safety, and reconnection. It is not a Consumer Reporting Agency and may not be used for decisions about employment, tenancy, credit, insurance, or any other FCRA-covered purpose.  Subscription  DoubleCheck Pro unlocks unlimited searches. Renews automatically, cancel anytime in Settings.  Privacy Policy: https://sites.google.com/view/doublecheck-privacy-policy Terms of Use: https://sites.google.com/view/doublecheck-terms-of-use

apps.name: Deepsearch AI: People Finder
apps.description: Looking to find someone’s social profiles or explore their online presence? With Deepsearch AI: People Finder, you can instantly uncover publicly available information about individuals – all in one simple app.  Just type in a name and our AI-powered assistant scans multiple sources to deliver fast, accurate results. Forget endless searching across different sites – everything you need is in one place.  Key Benefits & Features:  Smart People Search – Enter basic details and instantly get results.  Social Profile Discovery – Find social media accounts and online profiles with ease.  Comprehensive Lookup – Access publicly available records, photos, videos, and mentions.  Reconnect Instantly – Track down old friends, classmates, or colleagues in seconds.  Time-Saving Cross-Platform Scan – One search covers multiple platforms at once.  Trending & Popular Searches – Stay updated on who’s being searched the most.   Perfect For:  Networking & Business – Quickly check out new contacts.  Recruiters & Employers – Review professional backgrounds with confidence.  Journalists & Researchers – Collect reliable public data in seconds.  Online Daters – Verify someone’s online presence before meeting.  Curious Minds – Learn more about people without endless manual searching.   Privacy & Transparency  We only provide information that is publicly accessible, ensuring safe, responsible, and ethical use.   Subscription Info  Get unlimited access with flexible weekly, monthly plans.  Subscriptions renew automatically – cancel anytime.  Terms of Service: https://sites.google.com/view/deepsearch-ai-people-finder/terms
